nodes.name: Vapi End-of-Call Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED — activate only after Vapi is configured AND the Vapi assistant's end-of-call webhook URL is set to point at this workflow's production webhook path. Payload shape expected: { message: { type: 'end-of-call-report', call: { id, endedReason, duration, cost, recordingUrl, transcript, ... }, ... } }.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, node_name: 'voice_result_correlation_failed', error_code: 'VOICE_RESULT_NO_MATCH', error_message: 'vapi_call_id ' + ($json.vapi_call_id || 'unknown') + ' not found in voice_call_log', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
